creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lwhsu       2009-01-31 09:53:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    Mk                   bsd.python.mk 
    devel/py-twisted     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    devel/py-twistedCore Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    devel/py-twistedFlow Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    devel/py-twistedRunner Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    dns/py-twistedNames  Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    mail/py-twistedMail  Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    net/py-twistedPair   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    net-im/py-twistedWords Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    news/py-twistedNews  Makefile distinfo 
    security/py-twistedConch Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    textproc/py-twistedLore Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    www/py-twistedWeb    Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    www/py-twistedWeb2   Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update py-twisted-* to 8.2.0
  - turn devel/py-twisted into a meta port.
  - Update USE_TWISTED{,_BUILD,_RUN} in bsd.python.mk:
    * Remove flow, pair, xish, which are deprecated
      (but still update them to latest release in the tree)
    * Remove USE_TWISTED=13 (no port uses this)
    * Fix typos in twisted components _DEPENDS
  
  PR:             ports/130001
  Submitted by:   lwhsu
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
